$surface: In-app help drawer beside /signup + marketing-site teaser
$voiceCadence: calm, decisive, brisk — new-customer first touch

storyboard.voiceover: Create your RestoreAssist account in under a minute.
This is the signup page. Four fields, one checkbox, and you're in.

storyboard.onScreenText: Full name, email, password — that's it.
storyboard.voiceover: Full name, your work email, a password you'll remember. Confirm it. Tick the terms.

storyboard.onScreenText: Use your real work email — invoices and reports come here.
storyboard.voiceover: Use your real work email. Job confirmations, attestation links and insurer reports all land here.

data.caption: Same address every time you sign in.

storyboard.onScreenText: After signup, we walk you through three things.
storyboard.voiceover: After you create the account, we walk you through three things. Your A B N, your accounting connection, and your first inspection job. About ten minutes total.

keypoints: Enter your ABN — we pre-fill the rest from the ABR.
Connect Xero, MYOB or QuickBooks — one click, OAuth.
Run your first inspection — guided, with sample data.

storyboard.onScreenText: Prefer Google? One tap, no password.
storyboard.voiceover: Prefer Google? Tap Continue with Google. We link the account, skip the password, and land you in the same place.

data.footnote: Google Workspace and personal Gmail both work.

storyboard.onScreenText: You'll land on /setup — the activation wizard.
storyboard.voiceover: Once you submit, we send you straight to slash setup. That's the activation wizard.
RestoreAssist. One National Inspection Standard. Create your account, then run slash setup.
